translations.en: Bolesh
translations.zh: 波列許

translations.en: a strong, winged gargoyle warrior. He is sorely wounded.
translations.zh: 強健之有翼魔像武士，身負重傷。

translations.en: The gargoyle struggles to sit up.
translations.zh: 魔像費力地想坐起身。

translations.en: He shouts, "An-bal-sil-fer! Agra-lem! Agra-lem!"
translations.zh: 他嘶喊：「An-bal-sil-fer！Agra-lem！Agra-lem！」
translations.note: 魔像語原文保留，此為純粹魔像語叫喊

translations.en: The gargoyle collapses, exhausted.
translations.zh: 魔像精疲力竭，再度倒下。

translations.en: The gargoyle struggles to sit up.
translations.zh: 魔像費力地想坐起身。

translations.en: He shouts, "The False Prophet! Guards! Guards!"
translations.zh: 他嘶喊：「偽先知！護衛！護衛！」

translations.en: The gargoyle collapses, outraged but exhausted.
translations.zh: 魔像雖憤怒不已，仍精疲力竭倒下。

translations.en: The gargoyle struggles to sit up.
translations.zh: 魔像費力地想坐起身。

translations.en: "The False Prophet!"
translations.zh: 「偽先知！」

translations.en: "But to wear the Amulet of Submission?"
translations.zh: 「然已佩戴臣服護符？」

translations.en: "Then to express awe at your honor and courage."
translations.zh: 「則對汝之榮譽與勇氣，深感敬畏。」

translations.en: "Greetings again, honored one."
translations.zh: 「再度問候，尊者。」

translations.en: "To be named Bolesh Us-agra-lem, Bolesh the Troop-@Leader."
translations.zh: 「吾名波列許·烏斯-阿格拉-蘭，即隊伍@Leader統帥波列許。」

translations.en: "To lead what remains of our forces into battle."
translations.zh: 「率吾族殘部繼續征戰。」

translations.en: "To have recently returned from a mission to your side of the world."
translations.zh: 「近日已自汝等人類一方之世界完成任務歸返。」

translations.en: "To have tried to reach the @Codex."
translations.zh: 「曾試圖抵達@Codex知識寶典。」

translations.en: "To have had victory between our claws, but to have been thwarted on the verge of success!"
translations.zh: 「勝利已在爪間，卻在成功邊緣遭人阻攔！」

translations.en: "To have encountered an impervious @force field around the Codex."
translations.zh: 「遭遇知識寶典四周難以穿透之@force能量場。」

translations.en: "To know that such a field surrounded the Codex when my people possessed it."
translations.zh: 「知曉吾族持有知識寶典時，此類能量場亦曾環繞其外。」

translations.en: "To remember that only those on sacred @quests for wisdom could pass."
translations.zh: 「記得唯有進行神聖@quests智慧試煉者方能通過。」

translations.en: "To receive a sacred quest at the @Temple of Singularity."
translations.zh: 「須於@Temple獨一神殿接受神聖試煉。」

translations.en: "But to be uncertain whether a human's request would be answered there."
translations.zh: 「然不確定神殿是否接納人類之請求。」

translations.en: "To find the temple in the mountains to the north."
translations.zh: 「神殿位於北方山中。」

translations.en: "To need to fly to get there, though!"
translations.zh: 「然須展翅飛翔方可抵達！」

translations.en: "Yes, to be accessible only to the superior winged gargoyles."
translations.zh: 「是，唯有高等有翼魔像方可進入。」

translations.en: "To be totally unreachable by land-bound worker gargoyles!"
translations.zh: 「地行的工匠魔像根本無法到達！」

translations.en: "To suppose that it is totally unreachable by land-bound humans as well."
translations.zh: 「吾料陸行之人類亦同樣無法抵達。」

translations.en: "Farewell, False Prophet."
translations.zh: 「告別，偽先知。」

translations.en: "To honor my people with your sacrifice."
translations.zh: 「以汝之犧牲，榮耀吾族。」

translations.en: Weakly, the gargoyle says, "What?"
translations.zh: 魔像有氣無力地說：「什麼？」

translator_notes: 波列許為受傷的魔像隊長，語氣先憤後敬。魔像語原文（An-bal-sil-fer 等）照原樣保留。魔像說話語法（To+動詞）譯為古典文言。
